case_number: misc. application is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Revision Application No.177 of 2024 Date Orders with Signatures of Judges 1. For orders on MA No.13491/2024 2. For hearing of main case 30.05.2025. None present for applicant. This Criminal Revision Application, presented in office on 05.10.2024 was firstly fixed in Court for hearing on 17.03.2025 when none appeared for the applicant and matter was adjourned. Even today position is the same. Neither the applicant nor his counsel is in attendance. It seems that they have lost interest and not pursuing the matter diligently. This Criminal Revision Application alongwith pending misc. application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge
